title: Brumak Vanilla
description: Client-side QOL mods to improve the vanilla experience
body:
Modpack created for a better experience playing on vanilla servers, so most of them are client-side and shouldn't get you banned.

Most of the mods have been chosen to not majorly change the game. Some of these enhancements include:
- Perfomance enhancements (Sodium, Lithium, Memory leak fix, Idle tweaks)
  - More fps in your huge bases (Enhanced Block Entities)
- Camera zoom (Zoomify)
- Torches that glow while in hand (LambDynamicLights)
- A minimap (Journey map)
- Enviromental/Ambient sounds (Ambient sounds)
- Better looking player models (3d skin layers, Eating animations, Model gap fix)
- Better visibility of the world, even on servers with low render distance (Distant horizons)
- Discord status while you play (Craft presence)
- And more
